title: Shor
description: This is Shor's algorithm for integer factorization, which can efficiently factor large integers. It uses quantum Fourier transform and classical post-processing to find the prime factors of a composite number N.

params.help: N is the integer to factorize. Shor's algorithm is intended for composite integers greater than 1; prime inputs do not have non-trivial factors.
params.name: N
method
params.info: 请输入字符串：matrix 或 operator
